summary: P20 Stock Inventory Module Testing Complete. All 14 features tested and verified. Backend API (GET /api/proxy/v2/inventory/stock-inventory) returns 200 with current_stocks array for all 3 roles. Frontend components (OperationsHub KPI cards, /inventory page, sidebar nav) all working correctly with proper low-stock detection and visual indicators.
critical_code_review_comments: api.js getStockInventory() correctly calls GET /proxy/v2/inventory/stock-inventory and normalizes response
api.js normalizeStockItem() correctly parses quantity strings to floats (cal_quantity, display_qty, quantity, min_qty_alert)
useStockInventory hook correctly computes lowStockItems using is_low_stock boolean from POS API
useStockInventory hook correctly computes categoryCounts for category filter dropdown
StockInventorySummary.jsx correctly renders 3 KPI cards (Total Items, Low Stock, Categories)
StockInventorySummary.jsx correctly renders table with 6 columns (Ingredient, Category, Quantity, Min Alert, Status, Vendor)
StockInventorySummary.jsx correctly shows 'Low' badge (destructive red) for is_low_stock=true items
StockInventorySummary.jsx correctly shows 'OK' badge (emerald green) for is_low_stock=false items
StockInventorySummary.jsx correctly applies bg-red-50/40 row highlight for low-stock items
StockInventorySummary.jsx search filter correctly filters by stock_title, category_name, vendor_name
StockInventorySummary.jsx category dropdown correctly shows categories with counts
StockInventorySummary.jsx sort selector correctly implements 5 sort modes (low_stock_first, name_asc, name_desc, qty_asc, qty_desc)
StockInventorySummary.jsx refresh button correctly triggers fetchInventory and updates lastFetched timestamp
OperationsHub.jsx correctly renders P20 KPI cards (Stock Items, Low Stock) with live data from useStockInventory
OperationsHub.jsx correctly applies red styling to Low Stock card when lowStockCount > 0
OperationsHub.jsx KPI cards correctly navigate to /inventory on click
screenVisibility.js correctly defines scr-stock-inventory as FULL for all 3 roles (master/central/franchise)
Sidebar.jsx correctly renders Stock Inventory nav item with Package icon for all roles

test_credentials.master_user: abhishek@kalabahia.com / Qplazm@10 (rid=1, type=master, 0 low stock items)
test_credentials.central_user: owner@democentral2.com / Qplazm@10 (rid=782, type=central, 2 low stock: maida=0kg, patri=0kg)
test_credentials.franchise_user: owner@demofranchise4.com / Qplazm@10 (rid=786, type=franchise, 0 low stock items)

seed_data_creation: None - using real POS API via proxy
context_for_next_testing_agent: P20 Stock Inventory Module fully tested. All 3 roles verified: Master (4 items, 0 low stock), Central (4 items, 2 low stock: maida=0kg, patri=0kg), Franchise (4 items, 0 low stock). Key components: useStockInventory hook, StockInventorySummary.jsx (/inventory page), OperationsHub.jsx (KPI cards). Low-stock detection uses POS-computed is_low_stock boolean. All filters (search, category, sort) and refresh working correctly.

features_tested.P20-1: PASS - GET /api/proxy/v2/inventory/stock-inventory returns 200 with current_stocks array for all 3 roles
features_tested.P20-2: PASS - OperationsHub shows 'Stock Items' and 'Low Stock' KPI cards with correct counts from live API
features_tested.P20-3: PASS - 'Stock Inventory' nav item appears in sidebar for all roles (master/central/franchise)
features_tested.P20-4: PASS - /inventory page loads and shows KPI cards (Total Items, Low Stock, Categories)
features_tested.P20-5: PASS - /inventory table shows correct columns: Ingredient, Category, Quantity, Min Alert, Status, Vendor
features_tested.P20-6: PASS - Low-stock items show 'Low' badge (destructive red) and red row highlight; OK items show green 'OK' badge
features_tested.P20-7: PASS - Search filter works — typing ingredient name filters table rows
features_tested.P20-8: PASS - Category dropdown filter works — filtering by 'veggies' or 'non veg' shows correct items
features_tested.P20-9: PASS - Sort selector works — 'Low Stock First', 'Name A-Z', 'Qty Low-High' etc produce correct order
features_tested.P20-10: PASS - Refresh button fetches new data and updates 'last refreshed' timestamp
features_tested.P20-11: PASS - Central (C782) login shows LOW stock items (maida=0kg, patri=0kg) with red badges
features_tested.P20-12: PASS - Franchise (F786) login shows all items above threshold with green badges
features_tested.P20-13: PASS - KPI cards on OperationsHub link to /inventory when clicked
features_tested.P20-14: PASS - Back button on /inventory navigates to Operations Hub
